side_effects.description: Complete blunting of MDMA effects (200mg dose felt like nothing); only experienced negative effects of MDMA (inability to sleep, inability to urinate) without the desired effects

protocol_notes: OP has used the same MDMA stash for years with very predictable 200mg dosing. Started Retatrutide 2mg weekly 2 months prior to the MDMA experience. MDMA was taken orally (implied). OP notes if they had taken more MDMA they likely would have felt effects.
